name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M83300 Cream Print 】This Nano Diane bag reinterprets the classic Monogram pattern with a monochromatic aesthetic, incorporating striking metal hardware and a detachable shoulder strap and handle. The compact structure easily holds daily essentials like card holders and cosmetics. 10.5 x 6 x 19 cm (H x W x L)
